data.rationale: Best direct comp is identical 9-issue Vol 2 run at $23 landed. #1 inclusion and bagged/boarded condition support top of range. Round to $30.

data.title: ElfQuest Volume 2 #1-9 Complete Run 1996 WaRP Graphics Wendy Pini
data.description:
ElfQuest Volume 2 launched in 1996 from WaRP Graphics, picking up the beloved Wendy and Richard Pini series with a new chapter in the world of the elves. This is the complete 9-issue run from #1 through #9, including the first issue of the volume.

All issues individually bagged with backing boards by a careful collector. Condition is Very Fine throughout with no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage.

Series | ElfQuest Volume 2
Publisher | WaRP Graphics
Issues | #1-9 (complete run)
Year | 1996
Condition | VF, bagged and boarded

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Complete run of ElfQuest Volume 2 (WaRP Graphics, 1996), issues #1-9. All 9 issues individually bagged with backing boards. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage noted. Includes the first issue of the volume.
